# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

RUN groupadd -r appgroup && \
    useradd -r -g appgroup -d /home/appuser -m -s /bin/bash appuser

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        nginx \
        nodejs \
        npm \
        postgresql \
        postgresql-client \
        redis-server \
        supervisor \
        gosu \
        ca-certificates \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /var/run/supervisor \
    /app/web /app/api /var/run/postgresql /var/run/redis \
    /var/lib/postgresql/data /var/lib/redis

COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup ./web /app/web
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup ./api /app/api

WORKDIR /app/api
RUN npm install --production 2>/dev/null || true

RUN cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name localhost;
    root /app/web;
    index index.html;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
    }

    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080/;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}
EOF

RUN cat > /etc/redis/redis-secure.conf <<'EOF'
bind 127.0.0.1
port 6379
protected-mode yes
requirepass devredispassword
daemonize no
dir /var/lib/redis
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-server.log
EOF

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/redis && \
    chown -R appuser:appgroup /var/log/redis /var/lib/redis /var/run/redis

RUN cat > /etc/postgresql-env.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
export POSTGRES_USER=appuser
export POSTGRES_DB=appdb
EOF
RUN chmod 644 /etc/postgresql-env.sh

RUN cat > /docker-entrypoint.sh <<'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
set -e

PG_DATA="/var/lib/postgresql/data"
PG_VERSION=$(pg_config --version | grep -oP '\d+' | head -1)

chown -R postgres:postgres /var/lib/postgresql /var/run/postgresql

if [ ! -f "$PG_DATA/PG_VERSION" ]; then
    gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/initdb -D "$PG_DATA"
    echo "host all all 127.0.0.1/32 scram-sha-256" >> "$PG_DATA/pg_hba.conf"
    echo "listen_addresses = '127.0.0.1'" >> "$PG_DATA/postgresql.conf"
    echo "port = 5432" >> "$PG_DATA/postgresql.conf"

    gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/pg_ctl -D "$PG_DATA" start -w
    gosu postgres psql -c "CREATE USER appuser WITH PASSWORD 'devdbpassword';"
    gosu postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE appdb OWNER appuser;"
    gosu postgres psql -c "REVOKE ALL ON DATABASE postgres FROM PUBLIC;"
    gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/pg_ctl -D "$PG_DATA" stop -w
fi

exec /usr/bin/supervisord -n -c /etc/supervisor/supervisord.conf
SCRIPT
RUN chmod 755 /docker-entrypoint.sh

RUN PG_VERSION=$(pg_config --version | grep -oP '\d+' | head -1) && \
    cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/all-services.conf <<EOF
[supervisord]
nodaemon=true
user=root
logfile=/var/log/supervisor/supervisord.log
pidfile=/var/run/supervisor/supervisord.pid

[program:postgresql]
command=gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/data
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgresql-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgresql-stderr.log
priority=10

[program:redis]
command=gosu appuser redis-server /etc/redis/redis-secure.conf
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis-stderr.log
priority=20

[program:api]
command=gosu appuser node /app/api/server.js
directory=/app/api
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api-stderr.log
environment=NODE_ENV="development",PORT="8080",REDIS_PASSWORD="devredispassword",DB_PASSWORD="devdbpassword",DB_HOST="127.0.0.1",DB_USER="appuser",DB_NAME="appdb"
priority=30

[program:nginx]
command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g "daemon off;"
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx-stderr.log
priority=40
EOF

RUN chown -R appuser:appgroup /app /var/log/supervisor && \
    chmod -R 750 /app

EXPOSE 80

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://127.0.0.1:80/ || exit 1

ENTRYPOINT ["/docker-entrypoint.sh"]
